query:
UPDATE users
        SET 
            name = COALESCE($1, name),
            bio_raw = COALESCE($2, bio_raw),
            bio_rendered_html = COALESCE($3, bio_rendered_html),
            bio_content_hash = COALESCE($4, bio_content_hash),
            avatar_url = COALESCE($5, avatar_url),
            updated_at = NOW()
        WHERE id = $6
